title: justicia obovata
intro: Justicia obovata, also known as the "Butterfly Pea", is a plant species native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world, belonging to the Acanthaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Justicia obovata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its ability to act as an antioxidant and protect against cell damage. Justicia obovata can be prepared as a tea, capsule, or tincture, and is also used in traditional cooking and as a natural food coloring due to its vibrant blue color.
